flags: Higher saddle rocking detected (oscillation over stride).
Noticeable saddle drift detected (forward/back or sliding).
Shoulder/hip alignment variance detected (uneven rider balance).
recommendations: Check panel contact (bridging risk). Try different girthing, pad, or consult saddle fitter.
Review girth placement/tension and pad grip. Round-barrel horses may need stability solutions.
Coach note: work on even weight in both stirrups; ride straight lines and check saddle straightness.
Cadence not detected (short video or limited motion); film 30-60s with consistent trot/canter for rhythm.
Rider level estimate: Beginner (1/100). Focus on steady shoulders/hips and straight lines.
